chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 532 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.4992/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.4993/2019 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 09.10.2019 Mr. Shamsuddin Rajpar, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Samar Abbas seeks protective bail in Crime No.35/2017 registered at P.S Crime Circle, Sukkur for offences under Sections 409, 420, 468, 471, 109, 34, PPC read with Section 5, PCA-II, 1947. It is stated that case is pending before learned Special Court (Offences in Banks) Sindh, Karachi and NBWs have been issued against the applicant / accused. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his arrest at the hands of FIA for the mala fide reasons. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of five days is granted to the applicant / accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. Operation of NBWs for a period of five days is suspended. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of five days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of five days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application stands disposed of along with the listed applications in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
